{{CargoOrgan
|name=Ultimate Neuron
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10897
|idx=108
|description=The organ is obtained by infusing embryonic stem cells with the ultimate bionic part essence, having a leap in performance.
|skill=
|hp=1970
|def=352
|atk=243
|rush=278
|gene1=In explorations, B-tads gained +10%
|gene2=In explorations, 2x Card Drops +8%
|gene3=In explorations, DMG +10%
|gene4=In explorations, DMG +20% in Round 1
|gene5=Per Orange Coating crafted, gain +1 by +10%
|gene6=All TECH Bionic Parts, ELMT RES +2%
|gene7=In explorations, B-tads gained +10% (Awakened)
|}}
